idea.raw_input: A Flutter app containing mini games for different subjects (math, spelling, etc.) for ages 4-8. Includes progression: XP system, scoring, unlockable characters, daily streaks. Tiles on home screen, colorful playful design.

state_management.justification: 5 screens, no real-time features, local-only data. Riverpod StateNotifier is sufficient for managing XP, scores, characters, and streaks.

navigation.justification: 5 screens, no auth guards, no deep links. Simple named routes are sufficient.

local_storage.justification: SharedPreferences for simple key-value (XP, level, streak count, active character). Isar for structured game history records.

api_client.justification: No backend required. All data stored locally.

auth.justification: No auth required. Single-device local app.

di.justification: Riverpod providers serve as the DI system. No additional DI package needed.

packages.name: isar
packages.purpose: Local structured database for game history

overview.problem: Children ages 4-8 need engaging, age-appropriate educational games that make learning math and spelling fun.
overview.solution: A colorful single-device app with mini-games for math and spelling that rewards children with XP, scores, unlockable characters, and daily streaks.
overview.target_user: Children ages 4-8 (and their parents who download the app).
overview.success_metric: Children complete at least one game session daily and parents report improved engagement with learning.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Child selects a mini-game from a colorful grid of tile cards.
primary_actions: Tap a game tile to start
View current level/XP on top bar
Tap character avatar to go to profile

screens.name: Game
screens.purpose: Child plays the selected mini-game and earns points.

screens.name: Results
screens.purpose: Shows the child their score and XP earned after finishing a game.
primary_actions: View XP gained and level progress
Tap to go home or replay

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: Child views their unlocked characters, current level, and streak.

screens.name: Streak Calendar
screens.purpose: Shows daily login streak and streak rewards.
primary_actions: View calendar with streak days highlighted

features.name: Math Games
features.description: Mini-games focused on basic arithmetic (addition, subtraction) with age-appropriate difficulty for ages 4-8.
acceptance_criteria: Given the math game is open, when the child taps an answer, then the app provides immediate visual feedback (correct/incorrect).
Given a game session ends, when the child answers at least one question, then a score is calculated and displayed on the Results screen.

features.name: Spelling Games
features.description: Mini-games focused on letter recognition and simple word spelling for early readers ages 4-8.
acceptance_criteria: Given the spelling game is open, when the child selects or arranges letters, then the app provides feedback on correctness.
Given a spelling game session ends, when the child completes at least one word, then a score is calculated and displayed.

features.name: Home Screen
features.description: Colorful tile-based home screen showing available games, current level/XP bar, and character avatar.
acceptance_criteria: Given the app launches, when the Home screen loads, then the child sees a grid of at least 2 game tiles (math and spelling).
Given the Home screen is visible, when the child taps a game tile, then the corresponding Game screen opens.
Given the Home screen is visible, when the child taps the character avatar, then the Profile screen opens.

features.name: XP & Leveling System
features.description: Earning XP from game sessions to level up. XP thresholds increase per level. Level displayed on Home bar.
acceptance_criteria: Given a game session ends, when results are shown, then the child sees XP earned added to their total.
Given the child's XP crosses a level threshold, when returning to Home, then the level indicator updates to the new level.

features.name: Scoring System
features.description: Each game session produces a score. Score based on correct answers, speed, and streak within the game.
acceptance_criteria: Given a game is in play, when the child answers correctly, then the live score counter increases.
Given a game session ends, when the Results screen loads, then the total score is displayed with a star rating.

features.name: Unlockable Characters
features.description: New characters unlock at specific XP level thresholds. Child can select any unlocked character as their avatar.
acceptance_criteria: Given the child reaches a new level, when the Profile screen is opened, then a new character is available in the character selector.
Given the child selects an unlocked character, when returning to Home, then the character avatar updates to the selected character.

features.name: Daily Streaks
features.description: Tracks consecutive days the child opens the app. Displayed as a calendar with highlights. Streak milestones give bonus XP.
acceptance_criteria: Given the child opens the app on a new day, when the Home screen loads, then the streak count increments by 1.
Given the child opens the app on consecutive days, when viewing the Streak Calendar, then all consecutive days are highlighted.
Given the child breaks a streak (skips a day), when opening the app, then the streak resets to 1.

out_of_scope: More than 2 game types (math + spelling only for v1)

tickets.title: Create pubspec.yaml with all dependencies
tickets.description: Set up pubspec.yaml with Flutter SDK constraints and all required dependencies from architecture.
acceptance_criteria: pubspec.yaml has all packages from architecture.dependencies
SDK constraint >=3.3.0 <4.0.0
flutter pub get runs without errors

tickets.title: Create app theme and color tokens
tickets.description: Define the app's Material3 theme with bright, playful color scheme for children ages 4-8.
acceptance_criteria: AppTheme defines ThemeData with Material3 color scheme
Light theme uses bright, child-friendly colors
MaterialApp widget builds without errors on test run

tickets.title: Create text styles
tickets.description: Define reusable text styles for headings, body, and game text.
acceptance_criteria: At least 4 text styles defined (heading, subheading, body, caption)
Styles use large, readable fonts for children

tickets.title: Create failure classes
tickets.description: Define base Failure class for domain-layer error handling using freezed.
acceptance_criteria: Base Failure class extends Equatable
CacheFailure and DatabaseFailure subclasses defined

tickets.title: Create env config
tickets.description: Environment configuration using flutter_dotenv. Defines app name constant.
acceptance_criteria: EnvConfig class loads .env file
APP_NAME constant available
Graceful fallback if .env missing

tickets.title: Create app constants
tickets.description: App-wide constants: XP thresholds per level, streak milestones, max levels, game types.
acceptance_criteria: xpThresholdsForLevel(int level) returns int
Level 1 requires 0 XP, Level 2 requires 100 XP
Game types enum: math, spelling

tickets.title: Create main.dart entry point
tickets.description: App entry point. RunApp wrapper with ProviderScope and SharedPreferences initialization.
acceptance_criteria: main() calls runApp inside ProviderScope
SharedPreferences initialized before app renders
App runs without crash

tickets.title: Create app.dart root widget
tickets.description: Root MaterialApp widget with go_router integration and theme setup.
acceptance_criteria: MaterialApp uses AppTheme.lightTheme
Router configured via go_router
App displays without crash

tickets.title: Create PlayerProgress entity
tickets.description: PlayerProgress domain entity holding totalXP, level, streakDays, lastPlayedDate, activeCharacterId.
acceptance_criteria: totalXP, level, streakDays, lastPlayedDate (DateTime), activeCharacterId fields
Extends Equatable

tickets.title: Create PlayerProgress model with SharedPreferences
tickets.description: SharedPreferences-backed model for persisting player progress. Encodes/decodes to string format.
acceptance_criteria: PlayerProgressModel with SharedPreferences save/load
encode() serializes to String
decode(String s) returns PlayerProgressModel
Forward-compatible: checks parts.length for optional fields

tickets.title: Create UnlockableCharacter entity
tickets.description: UnlockableCharacter entity: id, name, iconKey, unlockLevel, colorScheme.
acceptance_criteria: id, name, iconKey, unlockLevel (int) fields
Extends Equatable
At least 5 predefined characters in a constant list (levels 1,3,5,8,12)

tickets.title: Create UnlockableCharacter model
tickets.description: SharedPreferences-backed model for persisting unlocked character IDs and active character.
inputs: IconData icon key mapping pattern from orchestrator pitfalls
acceptance_criteria: CharacterModel with SharedPreferences save/load
iconKeyToData(String key) returns IconData using const map (NOT IconData(variable))
Store only iconKey strings, never IconData objects
Forward-compatible decode

tickets.title: Create ProgressNotifier (Riverpod StateNotifier)
tickets.description: StateNotifier managing player progress state: XP, level, streak, active character, unlocked characters.
acceptance_criteria: ProgressNotifier extends StateNotifier<PlayerProgress>
addXP(int amount) increments totalXP and checks level up
incrementStreak() updates streak and lastPlayedDate
getUnlockedCharacters() returns list of unlocked characters
Level calculation uses xpThresholdsFrom AppConstants

tickets.title: Create GameType enum and GameResult entity
tickets.description: GameType enum (math, spelling). GameResult entity: gameType, score, xpEarned, playedAt, correctAnswers, totalQuestions.
acceptance_criteria: GameType.math and GameType.spelling values
GameResult has score, xpEarned, playedAt, correctAnswers, totalQuestions
Extends Equatable

tickets.title: Create GameResult model
tickets.description: SharedPreferences-backed model for persisting game history. Stores as JSON string list.
acceptance_criteria: GameResultModel with SharedPreferences save/load
encode() returns JSON string
decode(String s) returns GameResult
getHistory() returns List<GameResult> sorted by playedAt descending

tickets.title: Create HomeScreen widget
tickets.description: Home screen with colorful tile grid of games, XP bar at top, character avatar. Tapping a tile navigates to game. Tapping avatar goes to profile.
acceptance_criteria: HomeScreen extends ConsumerWidget
Grid of at least 2 game tiles (math + spelling) using GridView.count
XP progress bar showing current level progress
Character avatar icon at top-right, tappable to navigate to profile
Tiles are colorful cards with game icon and name
Navigator.push to game screen on tile tap using go_router

tickets.title: Create GameTile card widget
tickets.description: Reusable colorful card widget for displaying a game option on the home grid. Large icon, game name, playful colors.
acceptance_criteria: GameTile accepts title, icon, colorRadius onTap
Uses Card with rounded corners and shadow
Large enough for small fingers (min 80x80 tap target)
Bright, playful color scheme from theme

tickets.title: Create go_router app router
tickets.description: go_router configuration with routes for all screens. Home as initial route.
acceptance_criteria: Router defines named route for each screen in screen_file_map
Home route ('/') is initial route
All routes use go_router's go() navigation

tickets.title: Create GameScreen stub
tickets.description: Placeholder GameScreen showing game type title and a 'Coming Soon' message with back button. Will be expanded with actual game logic later.
acceptance_criteria: GameScreen accepts gameType parameter
Shows game type name as title
Has back button to return to home

tickets.title: Create ResultsScreen stub
tickets.description: Placeholder ResultsScreen showing score and XP earned. Will be expanded later.
acceptance_criteria: ResultsScreen accepts score and xpEarned parameters
Displays score and XP with star rating placeholder
Has 'Play Again' and 'Home' buttons

tickets.title: Create ProfileScreen stub
tickets.description: Profile screen showing current character, level, XP progress, total games played, and streak. Uses ProgressNotifier.
acceptance_criteria: ProfileScreen extends ConsumerWidget
Displays active character, level, XP progress bar
Shows total games played and streak count
Tappable streak section navigates to StreakCalendar

tickets.title: Create StreakCalendarScreen stub
tickets.description: Streak calendar screen showing monthly calendar with streak days highlighted. Current streak count displayed.
acceptance_criteria: StreakCalendarScreen extends ConsumerWidget
Shows current month calendar
Highlights days that are part of the streak
Displays current streak count
Shows reward milestones (3, 7, 14, 30 days)
